case_title: O'SULLIVAN SHEILA VS MCCARTHY BRIDGET et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,050.00 FILED BY O'SULLIVAN SHEILA AS TO DEFENDANT MCCARTHY BRIDGET DONOVAN PETER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'SULLIVAN SHEILA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCARTHY BRIDGET DONOVAN PETER $825.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $840.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
